title: Everything Optimized
description: Have you ever wanted to play to an optimized version of Minecraft? Here it is!
body:
# 🌟 **What is _Everything Optimized_?**  
_Everything Optimized_ is a performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to give you the smoothest possible experience — even with shaders — so you can play with your friends without lag, and without needing a server!

# ⚙️ **Performance Benchmarks**  
On my setup*, vanilla Minecraft runs at:  
• ~2400 FPS without shaders  
• ~110 FPS with high-quality shaders  
With **Everything Optimized**, the game runs at:  
• ~3600 FPS without shaders  
• ~250 FPS with high-quality shaders  
That’s a **50% boost** in vanilla, and over **2× more FPS with shaders**!

# ✨ **Included Shaders (Pre-Configured)**  
This modpack includes some of the best shaders available, pre-installed and optimized:  
• Bliss Shaders v2.0.4 *(default config)*  
• BSL Shaders v10.0 *(set to low)*  
• Complementary Reimagined r5.5.1 *(set to low)*  
• Solas Shader v2.8c *(set to low)*  
Only Bliss remains in its default configuration, as it's not configurable via external options.

# 🧩 **Extra Mods (Non-performance)**  
In addition to performance mods, you’ll find some lightweight quality-of-life additions:  
• Essential Mod – Play with friends *serverless and for free*  
• Clean F3 – Simplifies the debug screen  
• JEI (Just Enough Items) – View crafting recipes  
• JER (Just Enough Resources) – View mob drops and ore generation  
• Mod Menu – See and manage mods in-game  
• Waystones – Fast-travel between locations  
• Xaero’s Minimap – Mini-map HUD  
• Xaero’s World Map – Full world map

# \* **Test Configuration**  
• CPU: AMD Ryzen 7 5700X  
• RAM: 32GB DDR4 3600MHz  
• GPU: Gigabyte Radeon RX 6800  
• SSD: Samsung 990 PRO (7450 MB/s)
